title: The City of Ganpati
desc: A renowned mythology expert delves into the stories and legends surrounding Lord Ganesha, exploring his portrayal as the most beloved deity across various cultures in India.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: A submarine car from the James Bond movie turns up in the shop. Later, Ron and Tyler negotiate a deal with an antique store.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Ivy sharpens his dart game, as the buyers head to Riverside. Meanwhile, Brandi ropes in way more than she bargained for.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Dusty and Lupe receive a huge profit due to their impressive locker. Meanwhile, Brandi and Lisa recover their investments.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: Kamal Rana is a 62-year-old fire artist from Gujarat, who uses flamable materials like petrol, kerosene and camphor along with ink to give birth to his art pieces.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: Elite bladesmiths gather at Texarkana's Bill Moran School, America's oldest bladesmithing institution where the three top artisans face gruelling trials, pushing their craft to extremes.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: Jarrett Joyce faces trouble after winning a bid to transport a giant 40-foot colon. Meanwhile, Roy locks horns with the owner of a large video game.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Ivy sharpens his dart game, as the buyers head to Riverside. Meanwhile, Brandi ropes in way more than she bargained for.

desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Dusty and Lupe receive a huge profit due to their impressive locker. Meanwhile, Brandi and Lisa recover their investments.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: Kamal Rana is a 62-year-old fire artist from Gujarat, who uses flamable materials like petrol, kerosene and camphor along with ink to give birth to his art pieces.

title: Firepower: Defending India
desc: Explore some of the greatest weapons that showcase that pride of India's arsenal such as the Sarath, the Bofors 155mm field gun, and the Bhishma T-90 S.

title: Counting Cars
desc: Shannon enlists his friends to complete a long-overdue bike gift for Danny. Later, Danny becomes enamoured with a vintage Corvette while Ryan distracts him and unexpectedly acquires a Baja Bug.

title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
desc: Renowned actor and host Morgan Freeman revisits some of the most daring jailbreaks conducted by ingenuous prisoners from across the globe.

title: Nature Gone Wild
desc: Campers experience the power of a lightning strike, a massive boulder destroys a car and a gorilla has its way with a tourist.

title: The Einstein Challenge
desc: Amado DeHoyas and Ed Miller are two aeronautical experts from NASA who explore various concepts from flight of a plane to stealth bombers.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: Rick gets into preparation mode for a fast food face lift when a Big Mac Jail, belonging to a 1970s McDonald's PlayPlace set, arrives in the shop.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: The prodigal smiths of New Agrarian School in Bigfork, Montana are put to a gruelling challenge in order to prove their mettle and win a grand prize.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: The host meets Uday Talkwalkar, who elevates typing to an art form, crafting images with his typewriter. Impressively, his keystrokes create portraits and scenes that rival traditional sketches.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Dusty and Lupe receive a huge profit due to their impressive locker. Meanwhile, Brandi and Lisa recover their investments.

title: Counting Cars
desc: Danny gives up his beloved 1972 Monte Carlo for one of his biggest clients and relies on his team to get the job done. Meanwhile, Ryan and Mike ride in a 1965 Fastback Mustang.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the bizarre things that have fallen from the sky, such as meteorites, seafood and much more.

title: History's Greatest Heists With Pierce Brosnan
desc: The host sheds light on the Antwerp diamond heist and how the thieves executed their intricate plan after 27 months of planning.
